title: Street Fighter II Turbo Gameplay Map

narrative.description: The world's strongest fighters converge in a global martial arts tournament. Players select a character, battle through a ladder of opponents using special move inputs, combos, and supers, and confront M. Bison to become champion.
narrative.core_loop: Select a fighter, win two-round matches against CPU or human opponents using normals, specials, and supers, read and punish opponent patterns, manage health across rounds, and advance through the tournament ladder.

mechanics.map_notes: Quarter-circle, dragon punch, and charge motions execute character-specific special attacks.
mechanics.expression: Quarter-circle, dragon punch, and charge motions execute character-specific special attacks.

mechanics.map_notes: Normals and specials link into cancel chains and juggle combos for extended damage.
mechanics.expression: Normals and specials link into cancel chains and juggle combos for extended damage.

mechanics.map_notes: Best-of-three rounds with depleting health bars; first to empty opponent HP wins the round.
mechanics.expression: Best-of-three rounds with depleting health bars; first to empty opponent HP wins the round.

mechanics.map_notes: Health bar depletes on hits; zero HP loses the round.
mechanics.expression: Health bar depletes on hits; zero HP loses the round.

mechanics.map_notes: Whiffed attacks and unsafe moves are punished with fast counter hits.
mechanics.expression: Whiffed attacks and unsafe moves are punished with fast counter hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Light, medium, and heavy normals execute immediately on button press.
mechanics.expression: Light, medium, and heavy normals execute immediately on button press.

mechanics.map_notes: CPU opponents follow character-specific attack tendencies and patterns.
mechanics.expression: CPU opponents follow character-specific attack tendencies and patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Jump-ins, fireballs, and special wind-ups telegraph before resolving.
mechanics.expression: Jump-ins, fireballs, and special wind-ups telegraph before resolving.

mechanics.map_notes: Turbo edition adds super combo gauge filled by dealing and taking damage.
mechanics.expression: Turbo edition adds super combo gauge filled by dealing and taking damage.

mechanics.map_notes: Tournament ladder requires defeating each opponent to reach M. Bison.
mechanics.expression: Tournament ladder requires defeating each opponent to reach M. Bison.

mechanics.map_notes: Final M. Bison fight and some encounters span multiple rounds.
mechanics.expression: Final M. Bison fight and some encounters span multiple rounds.

mechanics.map_notes: Continue credits allow rematch after losing the tournament.
mechanics.expression: Continue credits allow rematch after losing the tournament.

mechanics.map_notes: Character select screen determines the entire moveset and playstyle for the run.
mechanics.expression: Character select screen determines the entire moveset and playstyle for the run.

mechanics.map_notes: Eight-directional walk, crouch, and jump for spacing control.
mechanics.expression: Eight-directional walk, crouch, and jump for spacing control.

mechanics.map_notes: Fights occur in bounded arenas with ring-out only via corner pressure.
mechanics.expression: Fights occur in bounded arenas with ring-out only via corner pressure.

mechanics.map_notes: Charge characters hold directions to power special moves.
mechanics.expression: Charge characters hold directions to power special moves.

mechanics.map_notes: Hadouken, sonic boom, and fireball zoning create projectile-based spacing games.
mechanics.expression: Hadouken, sonic boom, and fireball zoning create projectile-based spacing games.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Street Fighter II Turbo through its core fighting loop.
